title: Business Credential
description: Verifiable credential attesting that an organization is incorporated in a particular jurisdiction under a specific registration number.

registrationNumber.description: Registration number assigned by the registering authority.

jurisdiction.description: Jurisdiction of incorporation, recommended as an ISO 3166-1 / ISO 3166-2 code (e.g. "IN", "US-DE").

incorporationDate.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) on which the organization was incorporated.
